subcodes.first_line: O Marzieh! The Dayspring of the Light of Divine Unity summoneth thee unto the eternal realms of God. With the ear of thy soul hearken unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرضیه مطلع نور احدیه ترا بعوالم باقیه الهیه دعوت مینماید بگوش جان ندای
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
